mapper.sql: tpri.work_card, tpri.plan_id, tpri.attendance, tpri.duration, tpri.grade, tpri.evaluate, tpri.need_flag, tpri.enabled_flag, tpri.operation_code, tpri.error_msg, tpri.data_status, tpri.group_id, tpri.name, tpri.id, tpri.create_time, tpri.create_by, tpri.update_time, tpri.update_by, tpri.employee_id, tpri.score_line, tpri.match_implement_flag, tpri.remarks, tpri.check_method

${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.plan_id as ${tAlias}_plan_id, ${tAlias}.attendance as ${tAlias}_attendance, ${tAlias}.duration as ${tAlias}_duration, ${tAlias}.grade as ${tAlias}_grade, ${tAlias}.evaluate as ${tAlias}_evaluate, ${tAlias}.need_flag as ${tAlias}_need_flag, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.score_line as ${tAlias}_score_line, ${tAlias}.match_implement_flag as ${tAlias}_match_implement_flag, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.check_method as ${tAlias}_check_method
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_result_interface (work_card, plan_id, attendance, duration, grade, evaluate, need_flag, enabled_flag, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, group_id, name, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, employee_id, score_line, match_implement_flag, remarks,check_method ) values (#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attendance,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{duration,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{grade,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{evaluate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{needFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{scoreLine, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{matchImplementFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, #{remarks, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{checkMethod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update td_plan_result_interface set work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attendance = #{attendance,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, duration = #{duration,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, grade = #{grade,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, evaluate = #{evaluate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, need_flag = #{needFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, score_line = #{scoreLine, jdbcType = DOUBLE}, match_implement_flag = #{matchImplementFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, remarks = #{remarks, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, check_method = #{checkMethod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
